name: TimePickerComponent
description: Set of fields of FormItemControl component

inputs.name: allowNull
inputs.description: Whether a null input is considered valid(success).

inputs.name: ariaLabelledBy
inputs.description: Aria-labelledby for the time picker toggle button.

inputs.name: buttonFocusable
inputs.description: Whether AddOn Button should be focusable

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Disables the component.

inputs.name: displayFormat
inputs.description:
Display format option to customize time format in input control.
Must be a format option that is understandable by DatetimeAdapter.

inputs.name: displayHours
inputs.description:
When set to false, hides the input for hours.
Default value based on the current locale format option

inputs.name: displayMinutes
inputs.description:
When set to false, hides the input for minutes.
Default value based on the current locale format option

inputs.name: displaySeconds
inputs.description:
When set to false, hides the input for seconds.
Default value based on the current locale format option

inputs.name: inputId
inputs.description: Id attribute for input element inside TimePicker component

inputs.name: keepTwoDigitsTime
inputs.description:
When set to true, time inputs won't allow to have 1 digit
for example 9 will become 09
but 12 will be kept as 12.

inputs.name: meridian
inputs.description:
When set to false, uses the 24 hour clock (hours ranging from 0 to 23).
Default value based on the current locale format option

inputs.name: minuteStep
inputs.description:
The interval between selectable minutes (e.g., 1 for every minute, 5 for 5-minute intervals, 15 for 15-minute intervals).
Defaults to 1 (every minute).

inputs.name: parseFormat
inputs.description:
Parse format option to customize time format in input control.
Must be a format option that is understandable by DatetimeAdapter.

inputs.name: placeholder
inputs.description:
Default time picker placeholder which is set dependant on the hours, minutes and seconds.
Otherwise It can be set to a default value

inputs.name: placement
inputs.description:
The placement of the popover. It can be one of: top, top-start, top-end, bottom,
 bottom-start, bottom-end, right, right-start, right-end, left, left-start, left-end.

inputs.name: required
inputs.description: If it is mandatory field

inputs.name: spinnerButtons
inputs.description: Whether to show spinner buttons

inputs.name: tablet
inputs.description: Defines if time component should be used with tablet mode

inputs.name: time
inputs.description: Date time object representation

inputs.name: timePickerButtonLabel
inputs.description: Aria label for the time picker toggle button.

inputs.name: timePickerInputLabel
inputs.description: Aria label for the time picker input.

inputs.name: useValidation
inputs.description: Whether to validate the time picker input.

outputs.name: isOpenChange
outputs.description: Event emitted when the state of the isOpen property changes.

methods.name: getDisplayFormat
methods.description: Returns format options to be used during time formatting.

methods.name: getParseFormat
methods.description: Returns format options to be used during time parsing.

methods.name: getTime
methods.description: Returns the current value of the time input.
